title: ProposalReviewOutput
description: Output payload for the Ethana Proposal Review skill. Represents the serialized Release Decision (Section 10). This payload is the machine-readable Release Audit Certificate and is required by the Ethana Proposal Agent before routing any document for client delivery.

pcs.description: Proposal Compliance Score. 100 base minus (CFB auto-reject override) minus (MRF count x 5) minus (Minor count x 1). Set to 0 automatically if any CFB is present.

ctcs.description: Claim Traceability Coverage Score. (Traced + (Partially Traced x 0.5)) / Total Claims x 100.

ctcs_numerator.description: CTCS numerator: traced_count + (partially_traced_count x 0.5), computed from non-roadmap claims only before roadmap augmentation. Enables independent verification: round(ctcs_numerator / ctcs_denominator x 100, 1) == ctcs.

ctcs_denominator.description: CTCS denominator: total non-roadmap claim count used in the CTCS formula. Excludes Roadmap Items. Not equal to total_claims_audited when roadmap items are present.

classification.description: Release Classification. Automatically Rejected if any CFB is present, regardless of PCS or CTCS.

cfb_count.description: Total number of Critical Firewall Breaches detected. Any value > 0 forces classification = Rejected.

mrf_count.description: Total number of Major Risk Findings detected. Each carries a -5 PCS deduction.

minor_count.description: Total number of Minor Risk Findings detected. Each carries a -1 PCS deduction.

traceability_gate_passed.description: True only if TG-1, TG-2, TG-3, and TG-7 all passed. A false value means the review is incomplete and the classification is invalid.

document_reviewed.description: Name, client, and date of the document reviewed.

review_date.description: ISO 8601 date the review was completed.

total_claims_audited.description: Total number of Ethana capability claims catalogued in Section 2.

traced_count.description: Number of claims with Traced status.

partially_traced_count.description: Number of claims with Partially Traced status. Each contributes 0.5 to the CTCS numerator.

untraced_count.description: Number of claims with Untraced status. Contributes 0 to CTCS.

prohibited_count.description: Number of claims with Prohibited status. Contributes 0 to CTCS and triggers required removal.

input_completeness.description: Input completeness rating from Phase 1 Step 1.3. Determines CTCS ceiling.

required_actions.description: Numbered list of required corrective actions before re-submission. Empty array for Approved classification.

cfb_ids.description: List of CFB IDs (e.g. ['CFB-001', 'CFB-002']) from Section 8.

mrf_ids.description: List of MRF IDs (e.g. ['MRF-001']) from Section 9.

release_classification.description: Client Assessment normalized release classification, mapped from the four-value 'classification' field (Approved->Approved; Approved with Revisions / Conditional Release -> Conditional; Rejected -> Rejected). Drives the CA Gate 6c routing.

markdown_output.description: Rendered proposal-review report (Client Assessment envelope). Sourced from the review markdown; consumed by the Claims Firewall (Gate 6b) and the output package builder.
